absorption: ASK absorption is evident at multiple levels (e.g., 30564.25, 30563.25, 30561.75, 30560.25, 30560.00) where buyers are hitting asks but price is not moving up, indicating sellers are absorbing buying pressure.
dom_observation: Large stacked ask walls are present at 30564.25 (27), 30563.25 (23), 30561.75 (28), and significantly at 30560.25 (53) and 30560.00 (62), acting as strong resistance. Bids are not returning strongly; some bids are decreasing.
reason: Strong negative delta (-5K) in the current bar and declining CVD indicate robust bearish momentum. The presence of significant ask absorption and large stacked ask walls on the DOM confirms seller dominance, preventing any upward price movement.
should_reason: All order flow and volume profile indicators align for a bearish continuation, with clear absorption confirming seller dominance and a lack of buying power.
